strengths: Extensive full-stack experience across TypeScript, Node.js, React, and Nest.js
Proven expertise in AI-agent infrastructure and developer tooling, including MCP
Strong focus on testable projects with clean architecture and user experience
concerns: Limited direct experience with Kotlin/Java in recent roles, though historically proficient
Some gaps in primary stack exposure (e.g., Vitest) in listed roles
Highly diverse tech stack may indicate potential lack of deep specialization in required tools

key_factors.factor: Recent Kotlin/Java usage (primary secondary stack requirement)

response.justification: Bogdan demonstrates exceptional full-stack expertise with TypeScript/Node.js and React, coupled with direct AI-agent infrastructure experience—both highly relevant to the role. However, his recent work lacks deep engagement with Kotlin/Java, and while his versatility is impressive, it may dilute focus on the core stack requirements. His strong problem-solving, test-driven approach, and open-source contributions align well with the role's technical and collaborative expectations.
